habitat: Arid Kalahari regions of southern Africa.
traditionalUsesEn: Traditional San use as appetite suppressant on long hunts; modern supplements controversial.
traditionalUsesDe: Traditionelle San-Nutzung als appetithemmend auf langen Jagden; moderne Supplements umstritten.
activeCompounds: P57 oxypregnane steroidal glycoside (studied), other glycosides
preparation: Traditional fresh stem; commercial extracts (efficacy/safety debated).
cautions: Evidence for weight loss weak; conservation and biopiracy concerns. Not a proven diet drug.
historicalNotes: Famous for benefit-sharing debates after patent controversies.
habitatDe: Arid Kalahari regions von southern Afrika.
activeCompoundsDe: P57 oxypregnane steroidal glycoside (studied), other glycosides
preparationDe: Traditionell frisch Stängel; commercial Extrakte (efficacy/safety debated).
cautionsDe: Evidence für weight loss weak; conservation und biopiracy concerns. Not a proven diet drug.
historicalNotesDe: Famous für benefit-sharing debates after patent controversies.
